title: BLK-01 blik-InstaX without blikcode goes straight to provider redirect
steps_actions:
1. Initiate a deposit with paymentMethod = blik-InstaX and no additionalParameters.blikcode
2. Observe the buyer flow
steps_result: Buyer is redirected directly to the provider's hosted page. Our blikcode-entry screen is NOT shown. State transitions initial -> AWAITING_REDIRECT in one step (no INPUT_REQUIRED). Reproduces the original Expay incident scenario.

title: BLK-02 Regression: blik-MB without blikcode still triggers our blikcode entry screen
steps_actions:
1. Initiate a deposit with paymentMethod = blik-MB (or default, no override)
2. Do not pass additionalParameters.blikcode
3. Stage 0
steps_result: Our blikcode input screen is shown (INPUT_REQUIRED). Provider is NOT called yet. blik-MB H2H/S2S flow remains intact after the fix.

title: BLK-03 Regression: blik-MB with blikcode in additionalParameters - S2S to provider, no our screen
steps_actions:
1. Initiate a deposit with paymentMethod = blik-MB
2. Pass additionalParameters.blikcode with a valid 6-digit code
steps_result: No blikcode input screen on our side. Outgoing request to the provider contains source.bankCode = <blikcode>.

title: BLK-04 blik-InstaX with blikcode in additionalParameters - code is ignored, redirect proceeds
steps_actions:
1. Initiate a deposit with paymentMethod = blik-InstaX
2. Pass additionalParameters.blikcode with any value
3. Inspect the outgoing request to the provider
steps_result: blikcode is NOT sent to the provider in source.bankCode or source.accountBankCode. Buyer is still redirected to the provider's hosted page. No INPUT_REQUIRED step on our side.

title: BLK-18 Terminal config paymentMethod=blik-InstaX overrides default blik-MB routing
steps_actions:
1. Configure the terminal with paymentMethod = blik-InstaX
2. Initiate a deposit
steps_result: Request is routed to InstaX with apiPaymentMethod = 'blik-InstaX'. Default blik-MB route is NOT used. Reproduces the original Asana ticket scenario.

title: BLK-05 Provider status PaymentPageRequested for blik-InstaX maps to AWAITING_REDIRECT
steps_actions:
1. Trigger a blik-InstaX deposit
2. Inspect the provider's first response
3. Inspect our internal state transitions
steps_result: Provider returns status = PaymentPageRequested plus a Links array with the redirect URL. Our system transitions to AWAITING_REDIRECT in a single step - no INPUT_REQUIRED before it. Closes the root cause of the double-screen bug.

title: BLK-16 blik-InstaX request does NOT include source.bankCode
steps_actions:
1. Initiate a blik-InstaX deposit with any settings
2. Inspect the outgoing JSON to the provider
steps_result: The body contains source.paymentMethod = 'blik-InstaX' but does NOT contain source.bankCode. Confirms the BLIK input branch is fully skipped for InstaX as intended by the fix.

title: BLK-09 Happy path: blik-InstaX redirect -> success -> Captured
steps_actions:
1. POST a valid blik-InstaX deposit (PLN, PL, amount in 20-4100 range)
2. Redirect the buyer to the provider URL from Links
3. Confirm the payment with a valid blikcode on the provider page
4. Wait for the webhook
steps_result: Response carries nextAction.type = RedirectToUrl. Buyer reaches successUrl. Webhook with Data.Status = Captured is received and processed. Final transaction state = Captured.

title: BLK-08 blik-InstaX rejected by provider - failureUrl + Failed
steps_actions:
1. Initiate a blik-InstaX deposit with conditions causing decline (e.g. wrong/expired blikcode)
2. Follow the buyer flow to the provider page
steps_result: Buyer lands on failureUrl. State = Failed. declineReason and declineCode are populated when polling check-state.

title: BLK-20 Webhook PurchaseCaptured for blik-InstaX finalises the transaction
steps_actions:
1. Complete a blik-InstaX deposit successfully
2. Wait for the webhook from the provider
steps_result: Webhook with Type = webhook and Data.Status = Captured is received and processed. Transaction is moved to Captured. Without this the InstaX flow cannot finalise in production.
